bead.title: Stage 4.15: Playwright suite — Beads + Documents + Graph + Workers specs (LARGE)
bead.description: Four new spec files under cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/: beads.spec.ts, documents.spec.ts, graph.spec.ts, workers.spec.ts. Each covers: page loads, real data displays, primary interactions (filter, search, detail open, mutation, subscription). Minimum 5 TC-NNN cases per spec (20 total). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #49.
bead.acceptance: (1) `bun run test:e2e` passes all four new specs. (2) Each spec file has at least 5 test cases. (3) At least one test per spec exercises a mutation or subscription (not just a page load).
